title: Binlog Change Record Emission
interaction_flow: BinlogEventHandler → BinlogChangeRecordEmitter: new BinlogChangeRecordEmitter(partition, offsetContext, clock, operation, before[], after[], connectorConfig)
BinlogEventHandler → BinlogChangeRecordEmitter: emitChangeRecords(tableSchema, receiver)
BinlogChangeRecordEmitter → RelationalChangeRecordEmitter: [inherited] emitChangeRecords(schema, receiver)
RelationalChangeRecordEmitter → BinlogChangeRecordEmitter: getOperation() → returns stored Operation (CREATE/READ/UPDATE/DELETE/TRUNCATE)
RelationalChangeRecordEmitter → RelationalChangeRecordEmitter: switch(operation) dispatch to emitCreateRecord / emitReadRecord / emitUpdateRecord / emitDeleteRecord / emitTruncateRecord
-- CREATE/READ path --
RelationalChangeRecordEmitter → BinlogChangeRecordEmitter: getNewColumnValues() → returns after[]
RelationalChangeRecordEmitter → TableSchema: keyFromColumnData(newColumnValues) → Struct newKey
RelationalChangeRecordEmitter → TableSchema: valueFromColumnData(newColumnValues) → Struct newValue
RelationalChangeRecordEmitter → BinlogChangeRecordEmitter: getOffset() → BinlogOffsetContext
RelationalChangeRecordEmitter → BinlogOffsetContext: getSourceInfo() → Struct (via AbstractChangeRecordEmitter)
BinlogOffsetContext → BinlogSourceInfoStructMaker: [internally] struct(sourceInfo) during getSourceInfo()
BinlogSourceInfoStructMaker → BinlogSourceInfo: getServerId(), getCurrentGtid(), getCurrentBinlogFilename(), getCurrentBinlogPosition(), getCurrentRowNumber(), getThreadId(), table(), getQuery()
BinlogSourceInfoStructMaker → BinlogSourceInfoStructMaker: commonStruct(sourceInfo) [fills version, connector, name, ts_ms, snapshot, db]
BinlogSourceInfoStructMaker → BinlogSourceInfoStructMaker: result.put(SERVER_ID_KEY, ...) + binlogFile + pos + row + thread + table + query → Struct
RelationalChangeRecordEmitter → EnvelopeSchema: create(newValue, sourceInfoStruct, clock.currentTimeAsInstant()) → Struct envelope
RelationalChangeRecordEmitter → Receiver: changeRecord(partition, tableSchema, CREATE, newKey, envelope, offset, null)
-- UPDATE path (same PK) --
RelationalChangeRecordEmitter → BinlogChangeRecordEmitter: getOldColumnValues() → before[], getNewColumnValues() → after[]
RelationalChangeRecordEmitter → TableSchema: keyFromColumnData(old), keyFromColumnData(new), valueFromColumnData(old), valueFromColumnData(new)
RelationalChangeRecordEmitter → EnvelopeSchema: update(oldValue, newValue, sourceInfoStruct, ts) → Struct envelope
RelationalChangeRecordEmitter → Receiver: changeRecord(partition, tableSchema, UPDATE, newKey, envelope, offset, null)
-- UPDATE path (PK change) --
RelationalChangeRecordEmitter → RelationalChangeRecordEmitter: emitUpdateAsPrimaryKeyChangeRecord(...)
RelationalChangeRecordEmitter → EnvelopeSchema: delete(oldValue, sourceInfo, ts) → envelope1
RelationalChangeRecordEmitter → Receiver: changeRecord(partition, tableSchema, DELETE, oldKey, envelope1, offset, headers[newkey])
RelationalChangeRecordEmitter → EnvelopeSchema: create(newValue, sourceInfo, ts) → envelope2
RelationalChangeRecordEmitter → Receiver: changeRecord(partition, tableSchema, CREATE, newKey, envelope2, offset, headers[oldkey])
-- DELETE path --
RelationalChangeRecordEmitter → BinlogChangeRecordEmitter: getOldColumnValues() → before[]
RelationalChangeRecordEmitter → TableSchema: keyFromColumnData(old), valueFromColumnData(old)
RelationalChangeRecordEmitter → EnvelopeSchema: delete(oldValue, sourceInfoStruct, ts) → Struct envelope
RelationalChangeRecordEmitter → Receiver: changeRecord(partition, tableSchema, DELETE, oldKey, envelope, offset, null)
-- TRUNCATE path (BinlogChangeRecordEmitter override) --
BinlogChangeRecordEmitter → BinlogChangeRecordEmitter: emitTruncateRecord(receiver, schema) [overrides base which throws UnsupportedOperationException]
BinlogChangeRecordEmitter → BinlogOffsetContext: getOffset().getSourceInfo() → sourceInfoStruct
BinlogChangeRecordEmitter → EnvelopeSchema: schema.getEnvelopeSchema().truncate(sourceInfoStruct, clock.currentTimeAsInstant()) → Struct envelope
BinlogChangeRecordEmitter → Receiver: changeRecord(partition, schema, TRUNCATE, null, envelope, offset, null)
-- Unsigned integer type conversion (column value level) --

TableSchema/ValueConverter → BinlogUnsignedIntegerConverter: convertUnsignedTinyint(short) | convertUnsignedSmallint(int) | convertUnsignedMediumint(int) | convertUnsignedInteger(long) | convertUnsignedBigint(BigDecimal)
key_relationships: BinlogUnsignedIntegerConverter is a static utility class (no instances)
RelationalChangeRecordEmitter depends_on TableSchema (for key/value struct building)

key_methods: init(connector, version, config): builds Schema with fields [version, connector, name, ts_ms, snapshot, db, sequence, table, server_id, gtid, file, pos, row, thread, query]

BinlogUnsignedIntegerConverter.logic: If value < 0: add correction constant (type_max + 1) to recover unsigned representation

important_notes: BinlogChangeRecordEmitter is constructed per-row: before[] and after[] are Serializable[] from the binlog row event
TRUNCATE is the only operation overridden in BinlogChangeRecordEmitter; base class throws UnsupportedOperationException for TRUNCATE
PK update (oldKey != newKey) emits two records: DELETE (old key, with __debezium.newkey header) + CREATE (new key, with __debezium.oldkey header)
BinlogOffsetContext.setRowNumber(eventRowNumber, totalRows) delegates to BinlogSourceInfo.setRowNumber() AND tracks restartRowsToSkip for fault tolerance
BinlogSourceInfoStructMaker.struct() reads GTID only if non-null; reads threadId only if >= 0; reads table/query only if non-null
BinlogUnsignedIntegerConverter is applied during column value extraction (inside TableSchema's value converter), not inside BinlogChangeRecordEmitter directly
The source info Struct schema name is: io.debezium.connector.<connectorName>.Source
Offset map keys: server_id, gtids (GTID set), file, pos, event (eventsToSkip), row (rowsToSkip), ts_sec
